blocks.text: Carlsen hunts perfection. Barça-Atlético could seal La Liga.
♟️ 14:30 — Carlsen, Round 6 FIDE Candidates — every point shapes the World title
Barça lead La Liga by 4 points over Real Madrid, who face tricky Mallorca at 16:15. Win both games and the title race could be over by midnight.

blocks.label: Coming up
items: 🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders, seven Norwegians on the cobbles at cycling's Monument
🏎️ Sun 07:00 — F1 Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka, Round 3
♟️ Sun 14:30 — Carlsen back at the board, Round 7 Candidates
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid, Champions League quarterfinal
